case_number: civil servant even then she could not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1032 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3984/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.3985/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 31.03.2022 Petitioner is present in person. == Urgency is granted. The petitioner, by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to appoint her in local bodies on deceased quota basis as her brother being employee of Municipal Corporation Hyderabad died of sudden death during service in year 2017. No provision of law is referred by the petitioner which may make her entitled for appointment in local bodies on deceased quota basis. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the late brother of the petitioner was a civil servant even then she could not be directed to be appointed on deceased quota basis simply for the reason that she could hardly to be treated as a family member of late employee, which includes his widow, sons and daughters; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
